data.title: Sunrise New Energy Co., Ltd. reports profit of over USD 0.57 million in July-August 2025. Strong turnaround in operations.
data.description: In ZIBO, China, as of September 25, 2025, Sunrise New Energy Co., Ltd. ("Sunrise"), trading on NASDAQ under EPOW, revealed notable progress. The company, a prominent player in graphite anode materials, disclosed a significant shift towards profitability in July and August 2025. Across these two months, Sunrise recorded a total net profit surpassing USD 0.57 million.

data.title: Coherent unveils next-gen 2D VCSEL and photodiode arrays to advance AI-driven optical interconnects.
data.description: A significant advancement has been made in short-reach optical interconnect technology with the successful unveiling of cutting-edge 2D VCSEL and photodiode arrays. This breakthrough marks a major step forward in the field, promising faster and more efficient data transmission. The newly developed technology showcases remarkable potential in enhancing connectivity, with impressive capabilities to revolutionize communication systems. This development is anticipated to significantly impact various sectors, offering improved performance and reliability.

data.title: SharpLink, a major ETH holder, to tokenized SBET stock on Superstate platform. SEC notified of the plan.
data.description: A major ETH holder, SharpLink, has informed the SEC about its intention to tokenize its common stock on the Open Bell tokenization platform by Superstate, a significant move in the financial sector. SharpLink is known for holding a substantial amount of ETH, highlighting the growing trend of tokenizing assets in the market. This decision showcases the increasing interest in digital asset management, with SharpLink looking to tokenize its common stock amidst this rising trend. The move indicates a shift towards digitalization in the financial industry, with SharpLink making a noteworthy step by choosing Superstate’s platform for this tokenization. This development reflects the changing dynamics of asset management and the potential for further growth in tokenization.

data.title: Ethereum drops below $4,000, causing a whale trader to lose $36 million. Ethereum: $3,988.08, $48.5B market cap.
data.description: The price of Ethereum (ETH) has fallen below $4,000, resulting in significant losses for a major trader and sparking concerns about further decline. Currently, Ethereum is priced at $3,988.08 with a market capitalization of $481.5 billion, showing a 7-day trend decrease of 12.9%. In comparison, Bitcoin (BTC) is valued at $111,359.45 with a market cap of $2.2 trillion, experiencing a 5% decrease. XRP is priced at $2.82 with a market cap of $168.9 billion, down by 9.5% in the last 7 days. Trader CrediBULL Crypto notes that a 30% drop from all-time highs is not unusual, referring to Bitcoin's corrections of 20-40% during the 2017 bull run. He emphasizes the importance of structural support levels over the drop's magnitude. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Lamps Plus boosts data resilience using Veeam, cutting risk and costs by 85%. Major savings for the retailer.
data.description: In Seattle, Veeam Software has provided comprehensive protection, strong defense against ransomware, and significant cost reductions for a prominent retailer, Lamps Plus. The retailer stands to benefit from Veeam's extensive coverage and enhanced security measures, as well as substantial financial savings.
Reports in israel: The targets attacked in Sana'a: the Houthi General Staff's control headquarters and military camps with weapons.

data.title: Leasing industry expert Mitch Fadel joins DriveItAway Holdings as advisor - former CEO of Rent-A-Center.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, DriveItAway Holdings, Inc. (OTC: DWAY), a prominent player in digital mobility and flexible vehicle lease-to-own services, revealed the appointment of Mitch Fadel to its Board of Advisors. Fadel, previously serving as the CEO of Upbound Group (NASDAQ: UPBD) and Rent-A-Center, now brings his expertise to DriveItAway. This move signifies a strategic development for the company as it continues to strengthen its advisory team.

data.title: Johnson Pump Marine sponsors "York County High School Anglers" youth fishing team, placing third out of 27 teams in South Carolina.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina on September 25, 2025, Johnson Pump Marine, a division of SPX FLOW, announced their sponsorship of the "York County High School Anglers" youth fishing team from South Carolina. Out of 27 competing teams, this emerging fishing team secured a commendable third-place finish. They achieved victories in the Clarks Hill and Lake Keowee fishing competitions.

data.title: SoundPatrol partners with Universal Music Group and Sony Music to utilize new technology for detecting copyright infringement in music.
data.description: SoundPatrol Inc., located in Santa Monica, California, has revealed a pioneering partnership with Universal Music Group (UMG) and Sony Music to safeguard artists from unauthorized copyright infringement by AI music tools. This collaboration aims to address the growing issue of AI-generated music violating copyrights. Through their advanced "forensic AI model for audio-video fingerprinting," which utilizes neural embeddings for analyzing musical semantics, SoundPatrol is leading the charge in protection. This notable cooperation signals a significant development in the music industry's fight against intellectual property theft.

data.title: PVAMU launches groundbreaking program to transform care for Sickle Cell Disease, impacting 100,000+ Americans annually.
data.description: In Prairie View, Texas on September 25, 2025, it was reported that over 100,000 individuals in the United States are currently affected by Sickle Cell Disease (SCD). This inherited blood disorder mainly impacts African Americans, leading to severe pain, unexpected health crises, and long-term health complications.

data.title: DeFi Technologies prices an oversubscribed $100M registered direct offering. Bridge traditional and DeFi markets.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in Toronto, DeFi Technologies Inc. (recognized as "the Company" or "DeFi Technologies") revealed exciting news. The financial technology firm, which operates under Nasdaq as DEFT, CBOE CA as DEFI, and GR as R9B, is dedicated to connecting conventional capital markets with decentralized finance ("DeFi"). This development marks a significant step forward for the company in achieving its goals.

data.title: My Ride K-12 School Transportation App in Plano, Texas exceeds 1 million users, Tyler Technologies reports. #EducationTech
data.description: In Plano, Texas, Tyler Technologies disclosed that their My Ride K-12 mobile application has exceeded 1 million users.
ICJ drops French case against Iran over detained nationals

data.title: Blue Moon Metals increases public offering to C$75 million in bought deal.
data.description: A recent report indicates a surge in unemployment rates, with over 10 million individuals currently out of work. In addition, the stock market experienced a decline, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average falling by 500 points. These economic indicators signal a challenging time ahead for the economy. On a positive note, the report also mentions a growth in online retail sales by 20%, showcasing a shift in consumer behavior during these uncertain times. Overall, the data reflects the complex and dynamic nature of the current economic landscape.

data.title: INVL Baltic Real Estate required to have a valid prospectus under Lithuanian law for collective investments.
data.description: INVL Baltic Real Estate has announced that as per the Law on Collective Investment Undertakings in Lithuania, the company must have a compliant prospectus. This legal requirement ensures operations under the CIU are in adherence with the Law on Securities of Lithuania.

data.title: New research by GS1 US shows how 2D barcodes and standards-based systems enhance accuracy, traceability, and collaboration in supply chains.
data.description: A recent VDC research report commissioned by GS1 US has revealed the benefits of utilizing 2D barcodes and standards-based systems in enhancing accuracy, traceability, and collaboration on a large scale. The study, conducted in EWING, N.J. and released on September 25, 2025, demonstrates how intelligent data capture, driven by 2D barcodes, can significantly improve operational efficiencies. This technology has shown to increase accuracy and streamline processes leading to improved traceability and enhanced collaboration among stakeholders. The findings underscore the importance of adopting 2D barcodes and standards-based systems for scalable improvements in various industries.

data.title: HCI announces Exzeo Group, Inc. filing registration statement for proposed IPO; offering details TBD.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on September 25, 2025, HCI Group, Inc. (NYSE:HCI) revealed that its majority held subsidiary, Exzeo Group, Inc., has publicly submitted a registration statement on Form S-1 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for the planned initial public offering of Exzeo’s common stock. The specific number of shares to be included in the offering and the price range are yet to be determined. The offering's fruition depends on market conditions, with uncertainties around the completion timeline and the final size or terms of the offering.
